# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authz-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myAppLabel # replace this with the actual label that matches your microservices
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/*"] # modify as per the service accounts you want to allow access
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/path1", "/path2"]  # replace with actual path patterns
